MagicalRealmPlayground.prompt: A magical realm playground at sunset with weathered swings and a tall ornate carousel under red and orange evening summer sky, soft warm light catching painted wood, calm wide framing
MagicalRealmPlayground.notes: Anchor scene for the Grog music video; shipped MP4 at grog_too_big_for_playground_mv.mp4 uses Midjourney variants under this prefix. Pixar 3D animated feature style anchor applied at prompt tail per shot_list.json prompt_rules.
